_comment: Copy to verticals.json (gitignored) and fill in. promotionalText max 170 chars; no superlatives, no medical advice. appId is the numeric resource id from `audit` (NOT the 6608432371 store id).

pages.name: PCOS
pages.promotionalText: Track irregular cycles, symptoms, mood, sleep, and labs in one place. Free with most features, ad-free, on iOS.

pages.name: Pregnancy
pages.promotionalText: Kick counter, contraction timer, symptoms, nutrition, mood, and wearables in one free app for your pregnancy.

pages.name: Perimenopause
pages.promotionalText: Track hot flashes, cycle changes, mood, and sleep through perimenopause, with the connections between them visible.

pages.name: TTC
pages.promotionalText: Ovulation predictions, fertile window, BBT, and LH tests in one free app while you are trying to conceive.

pages.name: Mood
pages.promotionalText: Track mood alongside cycle, sleep, and energy, and see how they connect over time. Free and ad-free on iOS.
